theme: Rome turns business into living history

linkedin.text:
Most cities host your event. Rome makes your team feel chosen.

A conference dinner steps from 2,000 years of history. A keynote delivered against floodlit ruins. A toast that lands differently when the backdrop is eternal.

We produce corporate experiences in Rome that fuse strategy with spectacle — and the venue does half the talking.

📅 Book a free 30-minute call and we'll scope your Rome edition.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #B2BEvents #ItalyEvents #MICE #Leadership

instagram.text:
POV: your gala dinner is steps from the Colosseum. 🏛️🍷

Floodlit ruins. A toast under the stars. A team that suddenly understands what it means to be valued.

Rome doesn't host your event — it elevates it. And we handle every detail in between.

Save this 📌 and tag the HR lead planning next year's offsite.

Link in bio to start.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #TeamBuilding #LuxuryTravel #EventPlanning #WorkPerks #CompanyCulture

facebook.text:
We've produced events in 120+ countries. Rome still does something the others can't. 🏛️

There's a moment when the lights hit ancient ruins, glasses go up, and a whole team falls quiet at once. That's not luck. That's a setting working in your favor — and a crew making sure nothing gets in the way.

Strategy by day, spectacle by night. That's how we build a Rome no one forgets.

Thinking about Italy for your next event? Send us a message. 👇

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #ItalyEvents #GalaDinner #MICE

image_prompt: Sweeping aerial drone shot of Rome at dusk, the Colosseum and ancient ruins glowing amber, terracotta rooftops sprawling toward the horizon, the dome of a basilica catching the last light, no people visible up close, vast cinematic scale. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
